action.reasoning: Observation: iter 18 error 'AttributeError: module torchaudio.functional has no attribute binary_cross_entropy_with_logits' because previous train.py imported torchaudio.functional as F instead of torch.nn.functional. Also GradScaler received device_type incorrectly. Analysis: Need correct imports and manual label smoothing (BCEWithLogitsLoss doesn't support label_smoothing). Also need stronger codec augmentations using torchcodec to improve test generalization beyond near-perfect clean dev EER. Decision: Rewrite train.py with nn.functional, proper GradScaler, batch_size=16, early stopping (patience=5), aggressive augmentations (torchcodec-based codec simulation, resampling, lowpass, time masking), train 15 epochs (~2.5h), then submit eval next iteration to test harness.
